Federal share. FY25 $668B + CBO +$40B; P.L.119-21 cuts ~$1.2T over 10yr already embedded in baseline.
ACA premium tax credits & related; enhanced subsidies expired, enrollment falling in baseline (CBO -$79B revision).
SNAP, SSI, EITC/CTC refundable portions, UI, child nutrition. Split estimated from FY25 'other mandatory' $773B.
Mandatory disability compensation + VA discretionary health. CBO FY26 growth +$49B. Floor=1.0: cuts treated as infeasible.
Civilian + military retirement. Contractual; near-zero one-cycle controllability.
Student loans (large FY26 +$89B re-estimate), agriculture, deposit insurance, misc. Most volatile residual line.
050 function. FY25 $893B + CR. ~half flows to contractors (symbiosis constraint binds here).
State/USAID-successor ops, embassies, global health.
NSF, NASA, DOE Office of Science. Highest long-run growth spillovers per $ in the literature.
NIH, CDC, FDA, HRSA discretionary. Public-health infrastructure case-study lever.
Title I, IDEA, Pell (disc. portion), workforce training.
Highways, transit, aviation, rail (incl. IIJA tail).
EPA, Interior ops, DOE energy programs.
HUD (Sec.8, public housing), CDBG, rural development.
DOJ, federal courts, CBP/ICE (immigration enforcement elevated in baseline per 2025 reconciliation act).
Treasury/IRS ops, GSA, Congress, residual NDD. Absorbs disaggregation error — widest uncertainty.
